name: walktracker
description: Registro de caminatas con conteo de pasos, clima, metas y motivación.

scripts.test:unit: vitest test/domain-tests.js test/storage-tests.js test/migration-tests.js test/climate-tests.js test/motivation-tests.js test/runtime-tests.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:legacy: for f in test/*.js; do echo "=== $f ==="; node "$f" 2>&1 || true; done

author: BMAD
